basics.name: Yicheng Ma
basics.label: Computer Science and Technology | Computer Vision | Full-Stack Web Development
basics.summary: Undergraduate student majoring in Computer Science and Technology, with hands-on project experience in computer vision, web development, and intelligent systems. Familiar with Python, C++, Java, PyTorch, OpenCV, Vue 3, and Node.js, with strong engineering and project implementation abilities.

work.summary: Built a visual web system for smart agriculture monitoring around blueberry ripeness detection, tomato growth analysis, and multimodal agricultural scene recognition.
highlights: Tech Stack: FastAPI, Vue 3, CSS, SQLite, PyTorch, YOLOv8, OpenCV, PyAV, Transformers.

Responsibilities: Completed UGV/UAV dual-stream video access, blueberry ripeness result visualization, tomato growth analysis, multimodal result visualization, data storage and history traceability, recording playback, and statistical dashboards.

work.position: Hangzhou Cargo Station Checklist Management System
work.summary: Built a digital checklist platform for ramp operation inspections, supporting employee submission and administrator management.
highlights: Tech Stack: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JWT, Multer.

Responsibilities: Built backend services and APIs with Express, managed business data with MongoDB, and implemented employee-side and admin-side interfaces with authentication, checklist rendering, record submission, photo upload, template configuration, AI-generated reports, and issue closed-loop tracking.

work.position: Agricultural Multimodal Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
work.summary: Fine-tuned a Qwen-based multimodal large model for agricultural scenarios, supporting both image and text inputs.
highlights: Responsibilities: Built the dataset through on-site greenhouse photography, constructed the knowledge base, tuned hyperparameters, and deployed the model on Jetson AGX Orin.

work.summary: Built the vehicle-air / road-ground / cloud / network / map system to support intelligent connected vehicle testing, low-altitude transportation, and urban governance.
highlights: Responsibilities: Built the frontend page architecture, completed login, personal center, alert notification, and data display modules, coordinated API integration with Baidu, Alibaba, intelligent connected vehicle partners, Huawei, and government departments, and completed monitoring and risk visualization.

work.position: Space-Air-Ground Integrated Ripeness Detection System (Web Visualization Platform)
work.summary: Built a public web platform for blueberry ripeness visualization, providing farmers with broader access to visualized detection results.
highlights: Tech Stack: PyAV, OpenCV, PyAudio, Jinja2, Flask, MySQL.

Responsibilities: Built Jinja2-based HTML and JavaScript pages with Flask dynamic rendering, realized real-time video display and visualization of category, confidence, and quantity, wrote results to MySQL in real time, and supported video storage and playback.

work.position: Zhihang Road Control - Intelligent Vehicle Detection System for Large Transportation Hubs
work.summary: Combined BEV hybrid algorithms, visual recognition, and data analysis to enable efficient recognition and real-time monitoring of multiple vehicle types.
highlights: Tech Stack: PyQt5, PyAV, OpenCV, NumPy, pickle.

Responsibilities: Built the desktop-side interface with PyQt5, implemented local video parsing, live camera capture, frame refresh, playback control, video recording, file storage, and historical playback.

work.position: UAV & Robot Integrated Crop Ripeness Detection System Development and Deployment
work.summary: Developed an edge-computing-based intelligent detection system for UAV and robotic platforms with remote access, video storage, and cross-network control.
highlights: Responsibilities: Built the local interface with PyQt, integrated a TensorRT-accelerated object detection model, significantly improved edge inference efficiency, wrote detection results to MySQL in real time, and supported video storage and playback.

education.institution: Zhejiang University of Science and Technology
education.area: Major in Computer Science and Technology
